mapper.sql: id, employee_id, year, month, basic_salary, attendance_deduction, leave_deduction, overtime_pay, gross_pay, social_insurance_personal, housing_fund_personal, taxable_income, tax, other_deduction, net_pay, probation_ratio, leave_days, overtime_hours, late_count, early_count, absent_count, warnings, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_record ( employee_id, year, month, basic_salary, attendance_deduction, leave_deduction, overtime_pay, gross_pay, social_insurance_personal, housing_fund_personal, taxable_income, tax, other_deduction, net_pay, probation_ratio, leave_days, overtime_hours, late_count, early_count, absent_count, warnings, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{basicSalary}, #{attendanceDeduction}, #{leaveDeduction}, #{overtimePay}, #{grossPay}, #{socialInsurancePersonal}, #{housingFundPersonal}, #{taxableIncome}, #{tax}, #{otherDeduction}, #{netPay}, #{probationRatio}, #{leaveDays}, #{overtimeHours}, #{lateCount}, #{earlyCount}, #{absentCount}, #{warnings}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO salary_record ( employee_id, year, month, basic_salary, attendance_deduction, leave_deduction, overtime_pay, gross_pay, social_insurance_personal, housing_fund_personal, taxable_income, tax, other_deduction, net_pay, probation_ratio, leave_days, overtime_hours, late_count, early_count, absent_count, warnings, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.employeeId}, #{item.year}, #{item.month}, #{item.basicSalary}, #{item.attendanceDeduction}, #{item.leaveDeduction}, #{item.overtimePay}, #{item.grossPay}, #{item.socialInsurancePersonal}, #{item.housingFundPersonal}, #{item.taxableIncome}, #{item.tax}, #{item.otherDeduction}, #{item.netPay}, #{item.probationRatio}, #{item.leaveDays}, #{item.overtimeHours}, #{item.lateCount}, #{item.earlyCount}, #{item.absentCount}, #{item.warnings}, #{item.status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM salary_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND year = #{year} ORDER BY month ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE salary_record SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
